title: Algerian Ice Cream Fritters
description: Crispy fried balls filled with ice cream, a nostalgic Algerian dessert, combining bitter and sweet flavors in a unique treat, made with halal-friendly ingredients.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together the flour, cornstarch, and salt.
Gradually add the sugar, eggs, vanilla extract, and bitter almond extract to the bowl and mix until a smooth dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until it becomes pliable and smooth.
Cover the dough with plastic wrap and let it rest for 30 minutes.
Divide the dough into small balls, about 1 inch in diameter.
Flatten each ball into a thin circle, about 1/8 inch thick.
Place a small scoop of ice cream in the center of each circle.
Fold the dough over the ice cream to form a ball and press the edges together to seal.
Heat the vegetable oil in a deep frying pan to 350 degrees.
Carefully place the fritters in the hot oil and fry until golden brown, about 2-3 minutes on each side.
Remove the fritters from the oil and place them on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
Serve the fritters warm and enjoy.
